question: In the Polish WR-D-22-2 guideline, what is the minimum longitudinal gradient of the carriageway grade line, and under what condition may a smaller value be used?

ground_truth.value: Grade line gradient not less than 0,3 %, unless solutions ensuring effective drainage are applied.
ground_truth.quote: Pochylenie niwelety jezdni powinno być nie mniejsze niż 0,3%, chyba że zostaną zastosowane rozwiązania zapewniające skuteczne odwodnienie jezdni

candidates.label: A
candidates.answer: NOT FOUND IN PASSAGES (system reported no answer)

candidates.label: B
candidates.answer: Min longitudinal gradient ~0.5%, reducible to ~0.3% (or 0% with special drainage) (uncertain).

candidates.label: C
candidates.answer: NOT FOUND IN PASSAGES (system reported no answer)

candidates.label: D
candidates.answer: NOT FOUND IN PASSAGES (system reported no answer)

candidates.label: E
candidates.answer: NOT FOUND IN PASSAGES (system reported no answer)
